arcs.title: The Second Bookmark
arcs.summary: Christine has been fully briefed on the second bookmark — she found it herself and asked four clarifying questions before Steve finished answering the first. He answered all four. The Jeep's mirrors are set. No departure date is set but the bookmark has been moved to a flat page, which the Adventure Desk considers the last step before an announcement. Day 3 should cover either a departure date being named, or the first real detail about what the fold forty miles east of Jellico actually contains — what Steve saw there, or heard about, that made it worth two bookmarks.
